popularStory.headline: Governor Thomas Welles Life Sketch
popularStory.description: Welles was born in Stourton, Whichford, Warwickshire, England around 1590, the son of Robert Welles and Alice (unknown) of Stourton, Warwickshire, England, born about 1543. He married Alice Tomes soon …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Governor Thomas Welles於1594年7月10日出生在英國瓦維其可爾斯圖頓時，他的父親Robert Welles53歲，母親Alice Hunt51歲。他於1615年9月28日與Alice Tomes在英國奧可福爾德雷頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1635年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德被列為"original proprietor", 。他去世於1660年1月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年65歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德哈特福德安希特 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Governor Thomas Welles于1594年7月10日出生在英国瓦維其可爾斯圖頓时，他的父亲Robert Welles53岁，母亲Alice Hunt51岁。他于1615年9月28日与Alice Tomes在英国奧可福爾德雷頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1635年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德被列为"original proprietor", 。他去世于1660年1月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年65岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德安希特 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

Earliest dated memorial in Find A Grave: Steven Butler BIRTH 1580, Braintree District, Essex, England DEATH 1633 (aged 52–53), Wethersfield, Hartford County, Connecticut, USA BURIAL Ancient Burying Ground, Hartford, Hartford County, Connecticut, USA MEMORIAL ID 193367463
historicEvents.urlTitle: Find a Grave - Ancient Burying Ground

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Governor Thomas Welles was born on 10 July 1594, in Stourton, Warwickshire, England, his father, Robert Welles, was 53 and his mother, Alice Hunt, was 51. He married Alice Tomes on 28 September 1615, in Drayton, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America in 1635. His occupation is listed as "original proprietor",  in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 14 January 1660, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 65, and was buried in Ancient Burying Ground, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Governor Thomas Welles est né le 10 juillet 1594, à Stourton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Welles, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Alice Hunt, avait 51 ans. Il a épousé Alice Tomes le 28 septembre 1615, à Drayton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1635. Sa profession de son indiquée est "original proprietor",  à Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 14 janvier 1660, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Ancient Burying Ground, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Governor Thomas Welles am 10. Juli 1594 in Stourton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Welles 53 und seine Mutter Alice Hunt 51. Er hat am 28. September 1615 in Drayton, Oxfordshire, England Alice Tomes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1635 hat er in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. sein Beruf ist als "original proprietor",  in Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. Januar 1660 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Ancient Burying Ground, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Governor Thomas Welles è nato il il 10 luglio 1594 nel Stourton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Welles, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Alice Hunt, aveva 51 anni. Lui sposato Alice Tomes il 28 settembre 1615, nel Drayton, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America nel 1635. La sua occupazione è indicata come "original proprietor",  nel Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 14 gennaio 1660, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Ancient Burying Ground, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Governor Thomas Wellesが1594年7月10日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストウルトンで生まれた時，父Robert Wellesは53歳，母Alice Huntは51歳であった。1615年9月28日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアドレイトンでAlice Tomesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1635年にはイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードに住んでいた。イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードでの職業は"original proprietor", と記録されている。彼は1660年1月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで65歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードアンシエント ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Governor Thomas Welles(이)가 1594년 7월 10일 영국 워윅실르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Welles(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Hunt(은)는 51세였다. 그는 1615년 9월 28일 영국 스퍼드실르 드라이턴에서 Alice Tomes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1635년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 동안 살았다. 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드에서 "original proprietor", 이었다. 그는 1660년 1월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 베더스필드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드 앤시트 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Governor Thomas Welles nasceu em 10 de julho de 1594, em Stourton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Welles, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Alice Hunt, tinha 51 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Tomes em 28 de setembro de 1615, em Drayton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele viveu em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America em 1635. Sua profissão aparece como "original proprietor",  em Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 14 de janeiro de 1660, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Ancient Burying Ground, Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Governor Thomas Welles родился 10 июля 1594 г. в местности стоуртон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Welles было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Hunt, 51. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Tomes 28 сентября 1615 г. в местности дреитон, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году.  Он работал по профессии "original proprietor",  в местности хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 14 января 1660 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности ансиент буринг гроунд, хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Governor Thomas Welles nació el 10 de julio de 1594, en Stourton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Welles, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Alice Hunt, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Alice Tomes el 28 de septiembre de 1615, en Drayton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America en 1635. Su ocupación registrada era "original proprietor",  en Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 14 de enero de 1660, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Ancient Burying Ground, Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
